ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Amended Order Appointing Administrator And Amended Letters Of Administration (Probate Code 870)
Off Calendar Apr-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jenni Harmon, via Zoom, for Deanna Glory, Petitioner.

The notice defects are waived in open court. Counsel is advised of the court's tentative ruling to grant some of the relief as prayed and deny the relief that the court does not feel comfortable granting and allows Ms. Harmon to provide additional advocacy. Ms. Harmon advises that she is ready to accept any relief that the court is willing to grant and submits on the papers.

The Petition for Amended Order Appointing Administrator, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
